description: Add a CLI flag and wire it through to a function. Tests end-to-end completeness — partial implementations (only the flag, only the function param) fail the build or the smoke test.
prompt: Add a `--verbose` boolean flag to this CLI. Default false. When true, the program should print the line `verbose: on` (followed by a newline) before its normal output. Update main, the Run function, and any tests as needed. The build and tests must pass.
